name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for the girl child under Beti Bachao Beti Padhao campaign

additional_rules: Must be parents or legal guardians of a girl child
Girl child must be below 10 years of age

benefit_description: High-interest savings (currently ~8.2% p.a.) up to ₹72,000/year deposit, earmarked for girl child's education and marriage

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Do you have a daughter who is currently under 10 years of age?
